title: jasione humilis var. montana
intro: Jasione humilis var. montana, also known as the alpine bellflower or mountain bellflower, is a flowering plant species within the Jasione genus. This plant is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The roots and leaves of Jasione humilis var. montana contain saponins, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds that have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce stress, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Jasione humilis var. montana can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to treat a range of health issues, including anxiety, insomnia, and respiratory problems.
